title: Nash Equilibrium in Classic Game Theory Scenarios
description: A visual comparison of three classic game theory examples illustrating the concept of Nash Equilibrium, showing the players, their strategies, and the stable outcomes.
relationships: Prisoner's Dilemma shows dominant strategy equilibrium where both players defect
Battle of the Sexes shows two pure strategy Nash equilibria with coordinated choices
Matching Pennies demonstrates a zero-sum game with no pure strategy equilibrium, only mixed strategy
